description: Mix of off-topic banter, reactions, links, photos between poll responses. Tests that Rally filters noise and still advances.

messages._note: BANTER: short message, no name. Pre-filter should skip.

messages.body: Mike — tulum would be sick but idk
messages._note: INTRO: name buried in natural language. ConversationParser should extract Tulum.

messages.body: Emma — Tulum or Cancun either works
haha remember last trip when Mike lost his passport
messages._note: OFF-TOPIC: Rally should ignore this completely during INTRO

messages.body: ok focus lol. that's everyone let's go
messages._note: Advance: 'that's everyone' + 'let's go' should trigger advance
Confused participant mid-flow. Rally should explain current phase.
LINK: Airbnb URL dropped mid-conversation. Rally should detect wishlist/listing.
DECIDING_DATES: actual date suggestion amid chaos
Affirmative but short — pre-filter may skip

messages.body: this shit is taking forever can we just do tulum nov 8-12
messages._note: Profanity + actual decision content. Rally should extract dates + destination, ignore profanity.

messages.body: btw has anyone seen that new show on netflix
messages._note: OFF-TOPIC: total non-sequitur. Rally should not respond.
Re-anchor: planner checks where things stand after chaos
